chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُكَاتَبِ يَقْتُلُ الْحُرَّ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ وَ الْحُرِّ يَقْتُلُ الْمُكَاتَبَ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 24 – The contracted slave kills the free or injures him, and the free kills the contracted slave or injures him

text: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي مُكَاتَبٍ قُتِلَ قَالَ يُحْسَبُ مَا أُعْتِقَ مِنْهُ فَيُؤَدَّى دِيَةُ الْحُرِّ وَ مَا رَقَّ مِنْهُ فَدِيَةُ الْعَبْدِ.

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding a contracted slave who was killed. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It would be counted what (proportion) he was free from it, so he (the killer) would pay the wergild of the free, and what (proportion) he was still enslaved from it, is a ransom of the slave’.
